steps.description: Bring Zodiac Recommendation Token to BlackSmith at the entrance to the village.
Kill dragonfly to get 10 "Dragonfly's Sting" and bring to"Candy"
Use "Experimental Mob Flask" to capture a "Dragonfly" and bring it to"Grocer"
Kill "Roaming Soul"at night in Cloud City : 159.284

Wait and speak with Bonnie at night. Quest reward: None Quest Description: Franklin seems depressed and dreamy. He may be possessed by evil spirit. Wait to find out the ghost at night. Tip: Complete "Task 71" ¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡Bonnie's soul will appear at night. ¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡ <204000><0>Previous ¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡ <200001><0>Back

At your 14 level, go to speak with "Franklin" Quest reward: None Quest Description: Orchid Temple is at the north of Cloud City. There are no monks living there now. The temple is said to be haunted by ghost. A young man called Franklin came back from there the other day. It seems he is possessed by evil spirits. Please pay a visit to him. ¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡ <204000><0>Back ¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡ <200001><0>Previous

Locate Bonnie at Orchid Temple at night. Quest reward: None Quest Description: After getting back to consciousness, Franklin told you his love story in Orchid Temple. He met Bonnie in the temple. He is just a mortal who has no magic power. He can not save Ahriman-possessed Bonnie. But he hopes that there are someone who can help him to save his beloved in Orchid Temple. Tip: Complete "Task 7" ¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡Soul of Bonnie will appear at night. ¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡ <204000><0>Previous ¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡ <200001><0>Back
Tell Flap-eared Pig that Geralyn has returned safely.
Kill "Hoe Ghost" to obtain "Broken Tome 1" .Then take it to Smith
Kill "Muscular Nowt" and obtain "Broken Tome 2" .Then bring it to Smith
Get "Complete Tome" and bring it to Fiend of Plague
Bring "Royal Sword" and "Elixir by Fiend of Plague" to General Lee

Ar you 18 level, go to speak with "Commander" Quest reward: Experience: 2000 Gold: 400 Coin: 800 Item: "Bonnie's Pendant" Quest Description: After getting back to consciousness, Franklin told you his love story in Orchid Temple. He met Bonnie in the temple. He is just a mortal who has no magic power. He can not save Ahriman-possessed Bonnie. But he hopes that there are someone who can help him to save his beloved in Orchid Temple. Tip: Complete "Task 7" ¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡Soul of Bonnie will appear at night. ¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡ <204000><0>Previous ¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡ <200001><0>Back
Travel to"Map 144" and capture "Patrolman of Darkness"
At your 20 level, travel to "Map 131" to speak with "Flap-eared Pig"
Bring Badly-wounded Soldier's "Monster Information" to Flap-eared Pig
At your 24 Level, go to speak with Maple Valley Spirit
At your 32 level, bring "Rune" to "General Lee"
At your 35 level, go to speak with "General Lee" in Chill Pass
Kill "Lonely Ghost King" in Cloud City
Kill "Wild Ghost King" at Cloudy City:196.466
Take "Soul Absorber's Memory" to find "Evil Cat"
Bring "Soul of Soul Absorber" to"Night Owl"

At your 70 Level, go to speak with "Governor" Quest Description:With the help of Zodiac Eudemon, you have successfully run out of the gate. But from Night Owl and Soul Judge's face told you that something unexpected happened. Go to check on Jessica at the Governor's. She may need your help. ¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡ <210000><0>Previous ¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡ <200001><0>Back
At your 80 Level, go to speak with "Village Head"
Bring "Village Head"'s "Stone of Remorse" to "Lake Spirit"
At your 82 level, go to Lotus Peak to speak with "Thunder God"
At your 86 level, travel to "Map 161" to speak with "Grandpa"
Find Grandpa's Daughter in Soul-free Valley and back to Grandpa
Find Grandpa's Fere in Soul-free Valley and back to Grandpa
Speak with "Grandpa" and after his quest, speak with "Soul-wander Valley Spirit"
At your 76 Level, speak with "Melody" in Loneness Mountain
Bring "Letter of M/A Manager" to "Pet Curer"
Travel to East Gate to speak with "Corey"
Escort "Geralyn" to Goal Manor to meet "Flap-eared Pig"
Bring Flap-eared Pig's Rubble to find out spider sprite in human skin in the manor
Bring "Rune of Seal" to Maple Valley Spirit
At your 90 level, go to speak with "Norman"
Travel to "Map 210" to speak with "God of Venus"
Find the point and stick flag at the coordinates, you will get "Npc 21383" .Then bring "Npc 21383" to "God of Venus"
At your 92 level, go to speak with "God of Venus"
At your 94 level, go to speak with "Nalory"
Disguise in bandit and go to speak with East Gate Guard. Bring the Pulque to "East Cheerleader" . Then defeat him.
Disguise as a bandit again and speak with West Gate Guard. Then locate and speak with "West Cheerleader"
At your 96 level, travel to "Map 212" to speak with "Granny"
Travel to "Map 145" to capture one "Patrolman of Darkness" . Get monster's latest news from him.
Locate "Simois" and borrow "Rose Gold Flute" .Then kill "Carp Sprite"
At your 16 level, go to "Map 163" to speak with "Zodiac Eudemon"
At your 24 Level, go to speak with "Map 146" or "Zodiac Eudemon"
Take "Zodiac Eudemon's Memory" with you to find out "Force of Zodiac" and bring it to "Zodiac Eudemon"
Speak with Mike in Cloud City to get "Wine of Mind" and bring to "Zodiac Eudemon"
Take "Flawed Zodiac Rod" to kill "Black Widow"
At your 30 level, bring "Zodiac Rod" to "Zodiac Eudemon" in "Map 111"

Speak to "Hubbert" to know more about Renown Quest reward: Experience: 1000 Gold: 500 Coin: 800 Renown: 20 Quest Description: In Cloud City,Hubbert enjoys great renown and you can refer to him for your renown question. Renown is closely related with your money and skill proficiency degree. ¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡ <204000><0>Previous ¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡¡ <200001><0>Back
Gather some "Boar Meat" for the baby wolves.
Gather some "Boar Meat" to the wolf.
By the way, bring "Blacksmith's Dish" to "Blacksmith"
Kill monster who disguised as "Detective Lee"-Cloud City(134.111)
Help to gather 5 "Worm Spine" and 5 "Memorial Fragment"
Take Fortune Rune with you and speak to Ralph.
Kill "Hill Patroller" to obtain "Info on Tortoise"
Bring "Will of Greedy Ghost" to his grandson
Bring "Info on Blue Hoe" to "Soul Judge"
Kill "Little Leopard" and bring "Bamboo Tube" to "Laura"
According to information of "Bamboo Tube" , locate and kill Firewood Beast to get "Complete Bamboo Tube"
Kill "Armored Tortoise" to obtain "Turtle Shell Powder"¡Á10
Kill "Clan Guard" , you will see "Old Shaikh"
Kill "Fat Pig" to collect 10 "Fresh Pork" to "White Dragon"
Defeat "Old Shaikh" and see see how he will react
Kill "White Dragon" to obtain "Dragon Bone" and submit it to "Old Shaikh"
Defeat "White Dragon" and take "Dragon Bone" to "Old Shaikh"
Bring "Pet Feeder"'s "Letter of Perplexity" to "Captor Leo"
Kill 15 "Heart Demon" and speak with"Captor Leo"
Kill "Beatle Soldier" to get 10 "Beetle Horn" . Then submit it to "Joseph"
Kill 15 "Heart Demon" to find truth out and then go to check "Palm"
Kill "Heart Demon" to collect 10 "Cracked Mirror" for "Palm"
Kill 15 "Child Corpse" and then locate "Old Witch Doctor"
Kill "One-eyed Beast" to get 10 "Yellow Clay" and submit to "Longicorn King"
Bring "Indictment" to "Elfin" so as to expose his plot
Kill "Trick Sprite" and give him a lesson
Locate "Waiter" to get Oil Bottle and bring it to "Grocer Merchant" . Then take "Purchased Oil" to "Ryan"
Take "Flaming Leaf" to speak with "Beauty" for answer of Flaming tree's sickness
Kill 10 "Scorpion" and tell "Leif" this good news
Kill the fake "Gany" and speak with "Adrian"
According to Tyrant's "Scruffy Bag" , find him out and kill him
Travel to "..macro_GetMapName().." to collect 10 "Ghost Fire" 's "Nectar" and then bring them to "Bob" for healing his blindness
Locate "Hans" and "Steve" to obtain "Antelope Grass" and "Thorny Pill"
Kill "Evil Fork" and get "Fang Ring" .Then bring it to "Tina"
Kill "Evil Reamer" and obtain "Glinting Hat" . Then submit it to "Linda"
Travel to "Map 152" to defeat "Soul Envoy" and get "Icicle Lock" .Then bring it to "Sandy"
